items.title: 2 month player: gacha discussion
items.summary:
I rate this game’s gacha at 7.6/ 10. Monthly pull income for f2p is around 100 limited pulls (3-5 characters average), not including Certain events that give you 250 free pulls.

Someone said it was locked behind a paywall. Which the OTHER 250 pulls are, not this set of 250. 

I now have 5 functional teams after two months. 

I still have zero clue why someone said 500 bucks for an event?? 😭 I’m being so fr where in the Milky Way is this event??

Warning because this is where the game boils down to personal preference.

EVERY. SINGLE. Character. is capable of being good. Someone is labeled B tier? That means the character is GREAT. But you must  have a foggy idea of what kind of dps you want to build around. Banners are unpredictable because they tend to be gone for a few months, so you are limited to several dps upon starting, such as great standard characters or dps in reruns. 

You MUST use your brain. Chaos Zero Nightmare is easier. Here, I was already thinking on the tutorial. Auto battle is genuinely stupid- it just plays all of your cards in no order brainlessly. This is why I’ve stuck with the game though. Autoing stuff always kills my love for beautiful games.

Great art, but no animations. Understandable since this game doesn’t have many funds. 

There is a single gooner character (and she has a gooner equipment card 😭) but it doesn’t distract from the atmosphere at all imo. Also more male characters than certain games…

Problem is there’s a PvP/tcg thing. I despise PvP AND tcg so great combo there, I will be forever missing out on the 150 pulls. Why did they have to make that one part of the game actually contain noticeable materials…
items.author: Severelag

items.title: Game super good but kinda lag
items.summary: The game very good but it keep crashing and lag!!
items.author: KeichoFami

items.title: THIS GAME IS SO GOOD!!!!
items.summary:
the art and cutscenes are insane, the ui is very stylish, and i love the character designs ^_^

it reminds me of reverse 1999, chaos zero nightmare, and path to nowhere.. but id say its still very much unique! 
PLEASE TRY IT OUT. its genuinely so cool
items.author: rotintears

items.summary: Really unique game with wonderful visuals and designs.
items.author: feriiukas

items.title: very much recommend!!
items.summary: a bit of a long review, but i saw this game & was a little hesitant to download, but I’m so glad i did. the characters are very well designed & even the mc’s (female & male) are pretty. the combat is like a card game (similar to r1999) with turn-based combat, and the backgrounds are gorgeous. the english translation is apparently in beta, but i haven’t noticed any translation mistakes so far. the story is very compelling thus far and highlighted by the detailed art & characters. the combat itself is very nice to look at, and isn’t mechanically clunky or too difficult. it also includes some art within it, which is very pretty. the voice lines are not in english (I’m not sure if they’ll be in english at some point) but they’re so well preformed enough that the language barrier isn’t an issue, you can tell exactly what the characters are saying via the text & their tones. the gacha, as far as I’ve seen, is fairly good. it has a limited & standard banners just like any other gacha game, and currency doesn’t seem too hard to get. this game is so good that i was passionate enough to write this review. just play it.
items.author: naerystea

items.title: So fun with rich story!!
items.summary: I’ve recently began playing morimens about a month or two ago, and it’s so fun!! It’s such a fun game to play on and relax with, but also enjoyable to learn how all the mechanics work! The character designs are so unique and cool too the characters like Pickman and Thais with unique bodies is so cool and refreshing to see! I can’t wait to see all the more unique characters to pull in the future!😋😋
items.author: Chrissysilly!

items.title: เกมดีมักไม่แมส
items.summary: เนื้อเรื่อง 10 เต็ม เป็นฟีลดาร์กที่คาดหวังจาก czn แถมเกมเพลย์สนุกหลากหลายกว่าอีก มีแบ่งสายมีลูกเล่นพลิกแพลงอะไรได้มากกว่า กาชาเรตดีมากๆ ใครชอบดาร์กแฟนตาซีเนื้อเรื่องเขียนดีๆ แบบเราต้องลองง คุณภาพเทียบเท่าptnที่เป็นเกมหลักที่รักที่สุดของเราได้เลย

items.title: best of the best
items.summary: i absolutely love this game. graphics are amazing, i also adore that it’s somehow a card game, and im a big came of cards games. but the thing that i love the most about it, is the atmosphere, rain on the background and stuff… very calming
items.author: neandreyy

items.title: Beautiful game
items.summary: One of the most beautiful and catching mobile games. I love the atmosphere, character design, world-building and creepy story. Even though it is a gatcha, it is very generous with its ingame currency and pull rates.

items.title: Fun but flawed
items.summary: The game itself is very fun, but there are a few infuriating issues- I crash at the end of non-combat story stages, plus the game always launches upside down, needing me to manually rotate my phone to get it back to my desired screen orientation
